name: Animation
desc: Tells the client to play the swing arm animation for a specific entity.

fields.name: entityId
fields.desc: The entity that is swinging its arm

fields.name: type
fields.desc: 0=swing arm, 1=damage, 2=leave bed, 3=eat food, 4=critical hit, 5=magic critical hit

notes: Generated from C0APacketAnimation (server echoes to nearby players).

implementation.overview: Plays animation on entity (0=swing, 1=damage, 2=leaveBed, 3=eat, 4=crit, 5=magicCrit). Modules: ESP (visual effects), AntiBot.

modules.name: ESP effects
modules.purpose: Track entity animations for visual effects.
